message.content:
@startuml
actor Caller
participant ServeurDynamease
participant Asterisk
actor CalledDynamease

Caller -> ServeurDynamease : clickButton
ServeurDynamease -> ServeurDynamease : Verification
ServeurDynamease -> Asterisk : Create conference room
Asterisk --> ServeurDynamease
ServeurDynamease --> Caller : Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number
ServeurDynamease --> CalledDynamease : Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number_with information_of_the _caller
Caller -> Asterisk : Call_With_Trunk_Number
Asterisk -> CalledDynamease : Call_With_Trunk_Number
note over Asterisk : When the communication is ending
Asterisk --> ServeurDynamease : communication ending

@enduml
